text: let's say you wake up tomorrow and you
can't find anyone and I mean anyone
every single person on Earth has
disappeared except for you what do you
do well you have about 1 week left of
electricity before all of the lights
turn off for the very last time because
there was no one there to man the power
grids all of the house pets on earth
have now been trapped inside of their
homes so try and free as many of them as
possible and maybe pick up a companion
or two those you can't free have about 2
weeks before they pass away due to
dehydration or starvation eat as many
imported Foods as you can before they
expire like bananas pineapple and
avocado because once they're gone you're
going to have a very hard time finding
more then try and figure out how close
you are to the nearest nuclear reactor
because after about a month they're
going to become unstable and start
having meltdowns you have about 2 years
before all of the fuel expires so I
would recommend getting in a car and
driving to wherever you want to set
yourself up for the long term after
about a year the cities will start to be
reclaimed by Nature making your
surroundings a lot Greener watch your
head because it's around this time where
satellites will start falling back to
Earth
